name: Golden Almond Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix and margarine. Mix at low speed until crumbly. Set aside half of the mixture for topping.
4. Press the remaining crumbs into the bottom of the prepared pan.
5. In the same large bowl, beat together the ground almonds, powdered sugar, almond extract, and egg whites. Beat at high speed for 4 minutes.
6. Pour the batter evenly over the crumbs in the pan.
7. Sprinkle the chopped almonds over the mixture.
8. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
